# CWE-367 safe — Time-of-check Time-of-use (TOCTOU) Race Condition (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-367-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
	"strings"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

func LoadKYCScan(c *GinCtx) ([]byte, error) {
	name := c.Request.URL.Query().Get("scan")
	if strings.Contains(name, "..") {
		return nil, os.ErrInvalid
	}
	target := filepath.Join("/var/kyc/inbox", filepath.Base(name))
	return os.ReadFile(target)
}
